title: Uniformity of interpretation
doc_html:
§792.  Uniformity of interpretation

This Chapter shall be so construed as to effectuate its general purpose to make uniform the law of those states which enact it.

Acts 2009, No. 397, §1.
doc_text:
§792.  Uniformity of interpretation
This Chapter shall be so construed as to effectuate its general purpose to make uniform the law of those states which enact it.
Acts 2009, No. 397, §1.
